scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: dotnet ef database update --project backend/Twirla.Infrastructure --startup-project backend/Twirla.Api
scripts.db:add-migration: dotnet ef migrations add --project backend/Twirla.Infrastructure --startup-project backend/Twirla.Api
scripts.db:reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='backend/Twirla.Api/twirla.db';['','-shm','-wal'].forEach(s=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(p+s)}catch{}})" && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
